summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kathodik redesign across ALL pages. All requested features working: scroll animations, watermark hidden, arrow icons removed, header scroll-aware (transparent->white), dark footer, navigation, contact form submission, AI chat interface.
critical_code_review_comments: AnimateOnScroll component properly uses IntersectionObserver for scroll-triggered animations
useParallax hook implements passive scroll listener for performance
Header scroll-aware behavior working correctly (transparent at top, bg-white/95 + backdrop-blur-md after scroll >20px)
Footer 4-column layout working (brand, navigation, portal/kundenbereich, contact)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Contact form integrates with backend POST /api/contact and shows success toast

success_rate.backend: N/A (not tested this iteration - tested in iteration_1)

seed_data_creation: Contact form test message submitted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages redesigned with consistent AnimateOnScroll animations. Header scroll-aware behavior verified. Footer dark theme verified. All navigation links work. AI Chat budget limit issue still exists from iteration_1 (external dependency).
